recommendations.title: Monster's Battlefield
recommendations.overview: The soldier king Qin Yang's fiancée Ye Qin met with an unknown beast and died tragically. Gu Ping invites him to participate in Ye Qin's scientific research before her death. But Gu Ping is using Ye Qin's research results to combine the genes of unk

recommendations.title: Saving General Yang
recommendations.overview: When a rival nation sends troops to invade the Song Dynasty, the emperor sends general Yang Ye (Adam Cheng) to defend the nation. However, Yang's place in the court is shaky due to a feud with Pan Renmei caused by the accidental death of his son at t

recommendations.title: The Yin-Yang Master: Dream of Eternity
recommendations.genres: Action, Drama, Fantasy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Every few hundred years, the most powerful demon on earth—a snake demon—awakens, and the Yin-Yang Masters are summoned to the capital. Meanwhile, the Princess of the realm has her own plans, as she conspires to claim the demon’s power.

recommendations.title: Alice
recommendations.overview: Alice Tate, mother of two, with a marriage of 16 years, finds herself falling for a handsome sax player, Joe. Stricken with a backache, she consults herbalist Dr. Yang, who realizes that her problems are not related to her back, but in her mind and h

recommendations.title: Your Name Engraved Herein
recommendations.overview: In 1987, as martial law ends in Taiwan, Jia-han and Birdy fall in love amid family pressure, homophobia and social stigma.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Tai Chi Hero
recommendations.overview: Chinese steampunk martial arts blockbuster about the early years of Tai chi master Yang Luchan, the man who founded in the 19th century what has now become the most popular Tai Chi style in the world. The second instalment of the "Tai Chi" trilogy co

recommendations.title: Hui Buh: The Castle Ghost
recommendations.overview: After 500 years, castle ghost Hui Buh finally has some royal residents to haunt, but he soon loses his license to scare and must get recertified.

recommendations.title: Yaksha: Ruthless Operations
recommendations.overview: Nicknamed after a human-devouring spirit, the ruthless leader of an overseas black ops team takes up a dangerous mission in a city riddled with spies.

recommendations.title: Samsara
recommendations.overview: A love story situated in the Himalayas. A Buddhist monk can't choose between life and the way of the Buddha.
